reasoning: According to the CNBC article and Eurostat data published around October 30, 2025, Spain achieved a 0.6% QoQ expansion in Q3 2025, while the Eurozone overall grew by 0.3%. The Metaculus community prediction stands at 1.00 as of the same day, reflecting absolute certainty based on these official flash estimates. Given Spain's historical outperformance (3.5% YoY in Q3 2024 vs Eurozone's 0.9%), compounding the stronger QoQ performance throughout Q4 2024–Q3 2025 mathematically guarantees that Spain's YoY real GDP growth strongly exceeds the Eurozone aggregate growth rate in the Q3 2025 report. As such, I am assigning the highest allowed probability (0.98).
